name: 24" x 30" Dimensional II 3D Framed Wall Sculpture with Sand texture - Threshold™: Modern Canvas Art, Polystyrene Frame
description:
The 24" x 30" Dimensional II 3D Framed Wall Sculpture with Sand texture - Threshold™ seamlessly merges contemporary design with textured aesthetics. It features 3D abstract pattern, intricately textured with sand to add depth and visual intrigue. The monochromatic tone lends it a versatile appeal, making it easy to blend with various decor styles. Whether hung in a horizontal or vertical orientation, this 24" x 30" Dimensional II 3D Framed Wall Sculpture with Sand texture - Threshold™ is sure to become a mesmerizing focal point.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
